meaning: RNA [生化](哺乳动物细胞核中的) 异核核糖核酸
examples: Then at the end, we'll look at an example with a heteronuclear diatomic molecules.
Any heteronuclear diatomic molecule must have a dipole moment since its two ends are different.
And you would find that the bond energy of the heteronuclear molecule was nowhere on the average of the two.
